meta.summary: Molecular docking toolkit for ligand-receptor docking and virtual screening workflows.
meta.description: Molecular docking toolkit for ligand-receptor docking and virtual screening workflows.

test: python -c "import vina, rdkit, meeko, gemmi, prody"

meta.summary: Toolkit for reading, writing, filtering, sorting, indexing, and summarizing BAM alignment files.
meta.description: Toolkit for reading, writing, filtering, sorting, indexing, and summarizing BAM alignment files.

meta.summary: Toolkit for variant calling and manipulating VCF/BCF genomic variant files.
meta.description: Toolkit for variant calling and manipulating VCF/BCF genomic variant files.

meta.summary: Genome arithmetic toolkit for interval-based analyses on BED, GFF/GTF, VCF, and BAM files.
meta.description: Genome arithmetic toolkit for interval-based analyses on BED, GFF/GTF, VCF, and BAM files.

test:
printf 'chr1	0	10
chr1	20	30
' >/tmp/taf-bedtools-a.bed && printf 'chr1	5	12
' >/tmp/taf-bedtools-b.bed && printf 'chr1	5	10
' >/tmp/taf-bedtools-expected.bed && bedtools intersect -a /tmp/taf-bedtools-a.bed -b /tmp/taf-bedtools-b.bed | cmp - /tmp/taf-bedtools-expected.bed

meta.summary: Tool for detecting and analyzing segmental duplications from read alignments.
meta.description: Tool for detecting and analyzing segmental duplications from read alignments.

test: python -c 'import biser, ncls, numpy, tqdm, multiprocess'

meta.summary: NCBI BLAST+ suite for nucleotide and protein sequence similarity search and local BLAST database workflows.
meta.description: NCBI BLAST+ suite for nucleotide and protein sequence similarity search and local BLAST database workflows.

test: taf-blast-entrypoint | grep -F 'taf-blast wraps the NCBI BLAST+ command suite.' >/dev/null

printf '>subject1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' >/tmp/taf-blast-db.fa && makeblastdb -in /tmp/taf-blast-db.fa -dbtype nucl -out /tmp/taf-blast-db >/dev/null && printf '>query1
ACGTACGT
' >/tmp/taf-blast-query.fa && blastn -task blastn-short -query /tmp/taf-blast-query.fa -db /tmp/taf-blast-db -outfmt '6 qseqid sseqid pident length' | awk '$1=="query1" && $2=="subject1" {found=1} END {exit !found}'

meta.summary: Focused TAFFISH flow that builds a local BLAST+ database from FASTA with makeblastdb, then runs one BLAST+ search command against it.
meta.description: Focused TAFFISH flow that builds a local BLAST+ database from FASTA with makeblastdb, then runs one BLAST+ search command against it.

meta.summary: Fast and memory-efficient aligner for sequencing reads against long reference genomes using Bowtie 2 indexes.
meta.description: Fast and memory-efficient aligner for sequencing reads against long reference genomes using Bowtie 2 indexes.

test: taf-bowtie2-entrypoint | grep -F 'taf-bowtie2 wraps the Bowtie 2 command suite.' >/dev/null

printf '>ref
ACGTACGTTGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTTAACCGGTTAACCGGTT
' >/tmp/taf-bowtie2-ref.fa && bowtie2-build /tmp/taf-bowtie2-ref.fa /tmp/taf-bowtie2-ref >/dev/null && printf '@read1
TGCAAGTCGATCGTACGATCGTTAACCGGTTA
+
IIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIII
' >/tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq && gzip -c /tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq >/tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq.gz && bzip2 -c /tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq >/tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq.bz2 && bowtie2 -x /tmp/taf-bowtie2-ref -U /tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq.gz -S /tmp/taf-bowtie2-gz.sam --quiet && grep -v '^@' /tmp/taf-bowtie2-gz.sam | awk '$3!="*"{found=1} END{exit !found}' && bowtie2 -x /tmp/taf-bowtie2-ref -U /tmp/taf-bowtie2-read.fq.bz2 -S /tmp/taf-bowtie2-bz2.sam --quiet && grep -v '^@' /tmp/taf-bowtie2-bz2.sam | awk '$3!="*"{found=1} END{exit !found}' && bowtie2-inspect -n /tmp/taf-bowtie2-ref | grep -Fx ref >/dev/null

meta.summary: BUSCO v6 for assessing genome, transcriptome, and protein-set completeness using Benchmarking Universal Single-Copy Orthologs.
meta.description: BUSCO v6 for assessing genome, transcriptome, and protein-set completeness using Benchmarking Universal Single-Copy Orthologs.

meta.summary: Toolkit for manipulating BUS files and producing single-cell RNA-seq count matrices.
meta.description: Toolkit for manipulating BUS files and producing single-cell RNA-seq count matrices.

test: mkdir -p /tmp/taf-bustools-test && cd /tmp/taf-bustools-test && printf 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA\tCCCCCCCCCCCC\t0\t1\n' > input.txt && bustools fromtext -o input.bus input.txt && bustools text -p input.bus | grep -F 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA' >/dev/null

meta.summary: Burrows-Wheeler Aligner for mapping DNA sequence reads to large reference genomes.
meta.description: Burrows-Wheeler Aligner for mapping DNA sequence reads to large reference genomes.

test: { bwa mem 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: bwa mem' >/dev/null
{ bwa samse 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Usage: bwa samse' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-bwa-test && cd /tmp/taf-bwa-test && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
' > ref.fa && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && bwa index ref.fa >/dev/null 2>&1 && bwa mem ref.fa reads.fq 2>/dev/null | grep -F 'SN:chr1' >/dev/null && bwa aln ref.fa reads.fq > reads.sai 2>/dev/null && bwa samse ref.fa reads.sai reads.fq 2>/dev/null | grep -F 'SN:chr1' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-bwa-helper-test && cd /tmp/taf-bwa-helper-test && printf '>r1
ACGT
' > reads.fa && printf '>r1
40 40 40 40
' > reads.qual && qualfa2fq.pl reads.fa reads.qual | grep -F '@r1' >/dev/null && printf 'r1	0	chr1	1	60	4M	=	1	0	ACGT	FFFF	XA:Z:chr2,+2,4M,0;
' | xa2multi.pl | grep -F 'NM:i:0' >/dev/null

meta.summary: Fast clustering and comparison of protein or nucleotide sequence datasets.
meta.description: Fast clustering and comparison of protein or nucleotide sequence datasets.

test: { cd-hit-lap 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Minimum length of overlapping part' >/dev/null
{ read-linker 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'Maximum number of errors' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cdhit-test && cd /tmp/taf-cdhit-test && printf '>p1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>p2
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>p3
GILGFVFTLTVPSERKELKQLLQK
' > proteins.fa && cd-hit -i proteins.fa -o proteins.nr -c 1.0 -n 5 -M 0 -T 1 >/dev/null && test -s proteins.nr && test -s proteins.nr.clstr && clstr_size_stat.pl proteins.nr.clstr > proteins.nr.size && test -s proteins.nr.size

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cdhit-est-test && cd /tmp/taf-cdhit-est-test && printf '>n1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>n2
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>n3
TTGCAAGCTTGCAAGCTTGCAAGCTTGCAAGCTTGCAAGC
' > nucleotides.fa && cd-hit-est -i nucleotides.fa -o nucleotides.nr -c 1.0 -n 10 -M 0 -T 1 >/dev/null && test -s nucleotides.nr && test -s nucleotides.nr.clstr

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cdhit-gz-test && cd /tmp/taf-cdhit-gz-test && printf '>p1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>p2
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
' > proteins.fa && gzip -c proteins.fa > proteins.fa.gz && cd-hit -i proteins.fa.gz -o proteins.gz.nr -c 1.0 -n 5 -M 0 -T 1 >/dev/null && test -s proteins.gz.nr

meta.summary: Circos command-line engine for publication-quality circular visualization of genomic and relational data.
meta.description: Circos command-line engine for publication-quality circular visualization of genomic and relational data.

test: taf-circos-entrypoint | grep -F 'taf-circos wraps the Circos command-line plotting engine.' >/dev/null

meta.summary: Clustal Omega multiple sequence alignment tool for proteins, DNA, and RNA.
meta.description: Clustal Omega multiple sequence alignment tool for proteins, DNA, and RNA.

test:
printf '>seq1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
>seq2
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANL
>seq3
GKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLDERVGLIEVQANN
' >/tmp/taf-clustalo.fa && clustalo -i /tmp/taf-clustalo.fa -o /tmp/taf-clustalo.clu --outfmt=clu --force --threads=1 >/dev/null && grep -F 'CLUSTAL O(1.2.4)' /tmp/taf-clustalo.clu >/dev/null && clustalo -i /tmp/taf-clustalo.fa -o /tmp/taf-clustalo.sto --outfmt=st --guidetree-out=/tmp/taf-clustalo.dnd --distmat-out=/tmp/taf-clustalo.dist --full --force --threads=1 >/dev/null && grep -F '# STOCKHOLM' /tmp/taf-clustalo.sto >/dev/null && test -s /tmp/taf-clustalo.dnd && test -s /tmp/taf-clustalo.dist

meta.summary: Fast genome and protein completeness assessment based on BUSCO marker genes and miniprot.
meta.description: Fast genome and protein completeness assessment based on BUSCO marker genes and miniprot.

test:
mkdir -p /tmp/taf-compleasm-test && cd /tmp/taf-compleasm-test && printf '>chr1
ATGAAAACCGCTTACATTGCTAAACAACGTCAAATTTCTTTTGTTAAATCTCATTTTTCTCGTCAACTGGAAGAACGTCTGGGTCTGATTGAAGTTCAAGCTAATAAT
' > genome.fa && printf '>prot1
MKTAYIAKQRQISFVKSHFSRQLEERLGLIEVQANN
' > proteins.faa && compleasm miniprot -a genome.fa -p proteins.faa -o miniprot-out -t 1 >/dev/null && test -s miniprot-out/miniprot_output.gff && test -e miniprot-out/miniprot.done

meta.summary: Coding Potential Calculator 2 for classifying transcript coding potential from sequence-intrinsic features.
meta.description: Coding Potential Calculator 2 for classifying transcript coding potential from sequence-intrinsic features.

test: python -c 'import Bio, numpy, six; import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "/opt/cpc2/bin"); import seqio, compress'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cpc2-test && cd /tmp/taf-cpc2-test && printf '>coding
ATGGCCATTGTAATGGGCCGCTGAAAGGGTGCCCGATAG
>noncoding
TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT
' > input.fa && CPC2.py -i input.fa -o cpc2-out >/dev/null && test -s cpc2-out.txt && head -n 1 cpc2-out.txt | grep -F 'coding_probability' >/dev/null && grep -E 'coding|noncoding' cpc2-out.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-cpc2-orf-test && cd /tmp/taf-cpc2-orf-test && printf '>coding\nATGGCCATTGTAATGGGCCGCTGAAAGGGTGCCCGATAG\n' > input.fa && CPC2.py -i input.fa -o cpc2-orf --ORF >/dev/null && test -s cpc2-orf.txt && head -n 1 cpc2-orf.txt | grep -F 'ORF_Start' >/dev/null

meta.summary: Toolkit for reading, writing, editing, indexing, viewing, and summarizing SAM/BAM/CRAM alignment files.
meta.description: Toolkit for reading, writing, editing, indexing, viewing, and summarizing SAM/BAM/CRAM alignment files.
